title: Pride in Place Programme: Phase 2 place selection methodology note
body: "This note sets out the methodology used to select neighbourhoods in the Pride in Place programme.  This flagship funding will help build strong, resilient and integrated communities in areas that experience the most entrenched social and economic challenges.     Neighbourhoods were selected using a robust methodology based on deprivation (Index of Multiple Deprivation) and community need (Community Needs Index), to identify areas with the poorest social and economic outcomes. "
